ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ISCHANGED(Stage_Status__c) && TEXT(Stage_Status__c) = 'Completed' && TEXT(Stage__c) = 'Booked' && ( Aadhaar_Uploaded__c = false || Pan_Uploaded__c = false || Applicant_Photo_Uploaded__c = false || Proof_of_Address_Uploaded__c = false)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please upload the all KYC documents before marking the Booked stage as completed
